name: Lemon Fluff Custard for Dee
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees F.
2. Mix the well-beaten eggs with sugar and salt in a bowl. Gradually add half of the scalded half and half in a fine stream while stirring continuously.
3. In another bowl, mix sour cream into the remaining half and half, then stir into the egg mixture along with lemon juice.
4. Add rice, currants (or raisins), and additional dash of nutmeg to the mixture. Stir until well combined.
5. Pour the mixture into a buttered casserole dish and place it in a shallow pan. Fill the pan with hot water so that it reaches about halfway up the side of the casserole.
6. Grate fresh nutmeg over the custard.
7. Bake for 1 1/2 hours, or until set and golden on top. Enjoy this treat specially prepared for Dee!
